data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of showing availability in variable chunks, but the evidence does not confirm this. The linked use case indicates that the system shows availability in flexible blocks, yet there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates this functionality in action. Specifically, the evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that would confirm the availability is indeed displayed in variable chunks, leading to a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming that availability is shown in variable chunks as required.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
